title: Common Blockchain Consensus Mechanisms
description: A flowchart illustrating the decision process for selecting and executing different types of consensus mechanisms in a blockchain network.
relationships: A new block is proposed to the network
The network selects a consensus mechanism based on its protocol rules
Nodes perform the required task (mining, staking, voting, validating)
Other nodes verify the proposed block according to the mechanism's rules
If consensus is reached, the block is validated and added to the chain
If consensus fails, the block is rejected and the process restarts
